channel.title: Qwen on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Qwen on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: Qwen3.5-0.8B: A Multimodal Thinking Model That Fits in 1 Gigabyte
item.description: Qwen3.5-0.8B packs multimodal vision, a 262K context window, and an on-demand thinking mode into a 1GB file. Here's the architecture behind it and how to run it locally.
